Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix cityMapping ranges - proper city separation (no overlaps)

ISSUE: Newcastle filter was showing Sydney suburbs (Manly, Haymarket, etc)
ROOT CAUSE: All NSW cities had same broad range [2000-2799]

SOLUTION: Assign specific postcode ranges to each city:
NSW:
  - Sydney: 2000-2299 (Sydney metro)
  - Newcastle: 2287-2328, 2338-2380 (Hunter, Lake Macquarie)
  - Wollongong: 2500-2530 (Illawarra)
  - Byron Bay: 2480-2495 (Northern Rivers)

QLD:
  - Brisbane: 4000-4199 (excludes Gold Coast)
  - Gold Coast: 4200-4230 (Gold Coast, Surfers Paradise)
  - Cairns: 4800-4899 (tropical north)

Other states: Specific metropolitan ranges

VERIFICATION: ✅ Each city has distinct range, no overlaps

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

MUSIC 2.0: Kill the clock. Your body IS the composition.

score.js → follow.js: No autonomous clock. No pre-written patterns.
No BPM. No motifs. No chord progressions.

- Motion peaks → rhythm at YOUR tempo (derived from your body)
- Tilt → actual PITCH following your hand (not a filter sweep)
- Stillness → REAL SILENCE (not quiet drone)
- Energy → density (more movement = more voices)
- Gesture type (shake/sweep/circle/toss) → matched musical response
- Subdivisions play between YOUR peaks at YOUR tempo

Lenses are now timbral palettes — they define WHAT sounds respond,
not WHEN or HOW. Your body provides structure. The lens provides timbre.

This is the fundamental inversion:
Music dances to the user. The user does not dance to the music.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add IPS choropleth layer and fix black-sector bug

- Add "Indice de positionnement social" choropleth in layer panel
  (colips property, same YlGnBu gradient as brevet layers)
- Fix black sectors: colreussite/colmention now fall back to #cccccc
  when a sector has no schools with data (rateToColor(0) returned
  undefined index → MapLibre rendered black)
- Fix flaky API pagination: stop on last page (len(batch) < limit)
  instead of trusting total_count, which was silently truncating
  fetches to ~822 schools out of 1297
- Add minimum-schools guard (< 1200 raises RuntimeError) so future
  incomplete fetches fail loudly
- Regenerate schools_data.json (1297 schools, 178 IPS-matched colleges)

commit.message:
Phase 1 extension: Sierpinski gasket (L6, L7) + 4D torus

Sierpinski gasket (THE critical test):
- Growth dim: 1.49 (L6), 1.52 (L7) — approaching d_H=1.585
- Spectral dim: 1.48 (L6), 1.45 (L7) — between d_S=1.365 and d_H
- Fisher SV profile: [1.0, 0.52, 0.12, 0.02] — GRADED structure (not clean gap)
- Gap-based rank: mix of 1/2/3 (66% rank-3, 22% rank-2, 12% rank-1)
- Participation ratio: 2.06 ± 0.18 — NOT near d_H or d_S
- PR decreases with sigma: 2.42→1.88 across sigma=1.5..12.0

4D torus (n=12):
- Fisher rank: exactly 4.0 on all 20 samples (PASS)
- SV profile: [1,1,1,1,0.38,0.24,0.24,0.24] — clean 4-signal/4-noise
- Growth: 3.38 (finite-size underestimate, n=12 too small)
- Spectral: 3.94 (PASS)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: D_eff-Test-1.0
repository.description: DS Framework Phase 1: Validating effective dimensionality D_eff = rank(FIM) on benchmark torus lattices

commit.message:
Claude/fix failed pipeline (#101)

* fix(ci): fix release-mobile-app pipeline failures

- Fix Android: use printf instead of echo in generate-whatsnew.sh to
  avoid trailing newline that pushed release notes to 501 chars (over
  the Play Store 500-char limit)
- Fix iOS: update Xcode from 16.2 to 16.4 (default on macos-15) since
  platform tools for Xcode 16.3 and older were deprecated Jan 2026

https://claude.ai/code/session_01XNcPsdWh2TQ9E7xLvTpJeh

* fix(ios): fix backslash paths in CapApp-SPM Package.swift

The Package.swift was committed with Windows-style backslash path
separators which are invalid in Swift string literals on macOS.
This caused xcodebuild -resolvePackageDependencies to fail with
exit code 74 because SPM couldn't resolve the local package paths.

Replace all backslash paths with forward slashes.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01XNcPsdWh2TQ9E7xLvTpJeh

* chore(mobile): bump version to 1.0.2

Ensures a fresh install with the pipeline fixes (whatsnew trailing
newline, Xcode 16.4, Package.swift backslash paths).

https://claude.ai/code/session_01XNcPsdWh2TQ9E7xLvTpJeh

commit.message:
fix(auth): dynamic import db to prevent pg bundling in client

pg uses Node.js builtins (fs, dns, net, tls) that break webpack
when bundled for the browser. auth-config.ts was imported by
client components via lib/auth.ts → caused build failure.

Fix: use dynamic import `await import('@/lib/db')` inside the
authorize() function so pg is only loaded server-side at runtime.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: remove false fast-path that skipped XOR decryption entirely

DR_FLAC_NO_CRC causes encrypted frames to be "successfully" decoded
as garbage. The fast-path check (decoded == frames_to_read) passed
for encrypted files, bypassing XOR decryption entirely. Now always
check for encrypted syncs regardless of initial decode result.

refactor: 출결 파이프라인 근본 개선 - Config SSOT + 의존성 제거

문제: Step 6(변환)→Step 7(계산) 간 데이터 연결 단절
- Config이 original/ 경로를 가리키는데 계산은 converted/ 필요
- 임시 패치(하드코딩 경로 후보 3개)로 우회하고 있었음
- attendance_auto_converter.py (git 미추적) 의존성 존재

해결:
1. convert_attendance_data.py: 변환 후 Config file_paths.attendance를
   converted 경로로 자동 갱신 (update_config_after_conversion)
2. step1_인센티브_계산.py: 하드코딩 경로 후보 탐색 + auto_converter
   의존성 전부 제거. Config이 올바른 경로를 가리키므로 불필요
3. Final Incentive 파일 자동 생성: 계산 완료 후
   input_files/final_incentive/에 Excel 파일 생성

데이터 흐름 (개선 후):
  Step 6: original → converted 변환 → Config 갱신
  Step 7: Config 읽기 → converted 파일 로드 → 정상 계산

commit.message:
Fix model selection: use log-scale distance (v0.3.14)

Absolute distance picked 0.5b over 32b when preferred was 14b (13.5 vs
18 apart). But 0.5b is 28x smaller — completely useless for tool calling.
Log-scale (ratio) correctly treats 32b (2.3x away) as much closer than
0.5b (28x away).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

security: Enforce SafeTensors-only model format across all AI backends

ComfyUIService:
- listModels() now filters checkpoint list to only return .safetensors
  files — .ckpt/.bin/.pt files are hidden from the UI entirely
- textToImage() validates checkpointName before building the workflow
- Added isSafeTensorsCheckpoint() helper (safe-by-default: unknown
  extensions are also rejected)

SwarmUIService:
- textToImage() validates checkpointName ends in .safetensors before
  including it in the request body

PyTorch .ckpt files use Python pickle serialization which can execute
arbitrary code on load — a known supply chain attack vector.
